title: Caramelized Sugar Crisps
description: A light Thai dish featuring ground sugar that is buttery and crispy, perfect for a low-carb dessert or snack.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together sugar and butter until smooth.
Stir in salt and optional vanilla extract if using.
Transfer mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Pat into an even layer about 1/8 inch thick.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on the edges, rotating halfway through to ensure even browning.
Remove from oven and let cool completely before serving.
